rules.description: Home/End → beginning/end of line (Ctrl+A / Ctrl+E) [keeps SUPER+Arrow free for Rectangle]
Tab (Alt) [+IDEs, Remote Desktops, and Terminal Emulators]
Map Ctrl+Left/Right Arrow to move cursor by word
Map Ctrl+Shift+C/V to Copy/Paste in Terminal Apps
Map Ctrl+C/V/A/Z/X to Command+C/V/A/Z/X except in Terminal apps
